title: Garden Wolf Spider Origin
description: The garden wolf spider, is a mid-sized wolf spider that is native to Australia. They are active hunters, relying on their excellent eyesight to spot prey. They chase down insects and other small creatures, leaping to capture them with their powerful legs.
body:
The Garden Wolf Spider, is a mid-sized wolf spider that is native to Australia. They are active hunters, relying on their excellent eyesight to spot prey. Unlike many spiders, they don't build webs to catch food. Instead, they chase down insects and other small creatures, leaping to capture them with their powerful legs.

*Origin* created by ***Chris_The_Big!***                                     
Made for the **_Home Sweet Home_** Jam on the [Origins Discord Server](https://discord.gg/eyZaGpsF)

Pehkui is needed for the _"Short"_ power, but it's not required..

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Master of Webs**                                                                     
You're a master of Cobweb navigation, scaling them with ease. Striking an enemy traps them briefly. You also possess a spider-sense for non-arthropods trapped in cobwebs, and you can craft Cobwebs from string.                                                             
**Lunge** _(Primary)_                                                                   
You can lunge yourself forward.                                                    
**Exceptional Eyesight**                                                     
Your large, forward-facing eyes are particularly adept at detecting movement, highlighting nearby creatures (orange), players (red), and tamed animals (green). At night, your vision is improved, able to see creatures from much farther away.                                       
**Acidic Fangs**                                                             
While attacking someone, you have a chance to use your Fangs to Poison them.         
**Experienced Climer**                                                    
You are able to scale any wall with ease.                                               
**Wall slide**  _(Secondary)_                                                            
You can fall slowly on walls.                                                     
**Powerful Legs**                                                        
Your powerful legs make it so that you take less fall damage.                            
**Excavator**                                                           
You are able to dig very well!                                                        
**Speedy**                                                                        
You are faster on foot.                                                       
**Less Durable**                                                   
You have 7 hearts of max health.                                                
**Short**                                                        
You are short. But you are fast.                                                 
**Carnivorous**                                                              
You can only eat meat.                                                        
**Heavy Armor**                                                                
Gold and Netherite armor sets are too heavy for you to wear.                       
**Hazardous Fire**                                                                  
Fire is one of your major weakenesses.                                            
**Useless Equipment**                                                              
You can't use shields effectively. You also don't rely on wings for hunting. You prefer silent stalking of your prey.                                                                
**Spider Shader**                                                                     
You can enable the Spider Shader if you wish, I do not recommend it though.


</details>
